falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a bullish trend reversal, contradicting the bottom pattern and invalidating the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200%+ of the 30-day average on a single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates extreme buying pressure inconsistent with a bottom pattern, suggesting a blowoff top instead

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and bottom pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
